description: Contract of debt. Location: Fustat. Dated: [157]6 Seleucid = 1264/65 CE, and prior to 9 February 1265 CE (the date of verso). In which the proprietor of a sugar factory (al-sukkarī) Abū l-ʿAlāʾ David b. Yefet b. Shelomo acknowledges a loan of 377 nuqra dirhams from the banker (al-ṣayrafī) Abū l-Majd b. Abū l-Maḥāsin, to be repaid in weekly installments of 25 dirhams. Written and signed by ʿImmanuel b. Yeḥiel, also signed by Efrayim b. Shemuel ha-melammed. (Information in part from Goitein's index card.)
description_he: חוזה חוב, פוסטאט, 1264–1265. דוד בן יפת בן שלמה, בעל מפעל סוכר, מודה בהלוואת 377 דירהם. תשלום: 25 דירהם לשבוע.
